title: marsdenia carnosa
intro: Marsdenia carnosa, also known as the Coral-root vine, is a perennial plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Marsdenia carnosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Marsdenia carnosa can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
